cd /root/Lyudmula && ./venv/bin/python3 -c "
from google.oauth2 import service_account
from googleapiclient.discovery import build

creds = service_account.Credentials.from_service_account_file('google_credentials.json', scopes=['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar'])
service = build('calendar', 'v3', credentials=creds)

event = {
    'summary': 'Похід до Альони — занести курку',
    'start': {'dateTime': '2026-05-28T12:00:00', 'timeZone': 'Europe/Kyiv'},
    'end':   {'dateTime': '2026-05-28T13:00:00', 'timeZone': 'Europe/Kyiv'},
}
result = service.events().insert(calendarId='lydazab@gmail.com', body=event).execute()
print('OK:', result.get('summary'), result.get('start'))
"
stdout: OK: Похід до Альони — занести курку {'dateTime': '2026-05-28T12:00:00+03:00', 'timeZone': 'Europe/Kiev'}
